# Menzerna Super Finish Plus 3800 - 32 oz

Product Image: https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Menzerna-Super-Finish-Plus-3800-32-oz_217_1_m_2444.jpg
High Resolution Image: https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Menzerna-Super-Finish-Plus-3800-32-oz_217_1_lw_2444.jpg

Price: $48.99

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+: $45.99 (6% savings)

Available Sizes: 32 oz - $48.99

### Product Information
- When you want the absolute maximum depth and gloss, finish your polishing with Super Finish Plus 3800
- Works great alone or after correcting paint imperfections with more aggressive polishes
- Easy to work with, with long work time and easy removal
- Most commonly applied with a crimson, black or blue finishing pad
- Product Code: M-3800Q

### Product Description
Menzerna's Super Finish Plus 3800 was formerly known as the Micro Polish SF 4500 but a new name and label have been brought in. Its effective on the newer and harder ceramic clear coats, but it also works extremely well on traditional clear coats. This outstanding nano polish was designed to finish down your paint for an ultra smooth finish at the microscopic level. You can use this product after more aggressive polishing to help remove any surface haze, light imperfections, etc. It is also totally safe to use on brand new OEM paint. It uses some of the smallest and smoothest cutting particles ever put in a polish for a remarkably clear finish. This process of burnishing or jeweling the paint will provide the greatest optical clarity possible in the clear coat, which is how you get the deepest reflection possible. Apply this polish with a buffer and a finishing pad (crimson, blue or black Lake Country Pad) for best results. Use the Menzerna's Super Finish Plus 3800 for amazing results so your paint is truly clean and vibrant and then apply your favorite glaze, sealant and wax afterward.

To learn more about Menzerna Polishes and the 2015 label name change please see the Menzerna Polishing Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/Menzerna-Polishing-Chart/

### Professional Detailer Reviews
I will never finish another black car without using this stuff! Simply put, it's super easy to work with, easy on, easy off.
- Product Review: Menzerna SF4500 by Eric Schuster
  Review Image: https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2011/11/Product-Review-Menzerna-SF4500-300x147.jpg
  Review URL: https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/product-review-menzerna-sf4500/

### From The Label
Ultra-Finishing Polish
- Guarantees a perfect deep-gloss finish
- Contains no silicone, wax or fillers

### Product Downloads
- 2015 Menzerna Label Name Change Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna_2015_Label_Name_Change_Chart.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-2015-Polishing-Program.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Program: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Programme.pdf
- 2019 Menzerna Polishing Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Chart.pdf
- Menzerna Paint Defect Repair Product Range: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Paint-Defect-Repair-Product-Range.pdf
- Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Compounds-Chart.pdf

### Customer Reviews
100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 34 ratings)

Reviewed by Scott M. on 12/8/2023 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I had high expectations, but it is worth writing about. This polish won't correct much, but the gloss left behind is incredible. This is sort of a niche product and not everyone will need it, or appreciate it. I use it as a 3rd stage polish, but it might work as a 2nd stage on softer paint or if a light cut compound was used. Apart from the especially glossy finish, it has a long work time, minimal dusting (if any at all), and it has the easiest wipe-off of any polish I have used. I don't like the cap, it shoots a little product every time I close it, which is more annoying than it might sound. However, there isn't anything significant to complain about.

Reviewed by dennis s. on 2/7/2019 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Took out all the swirls and light scratches from a black f 150. Looks great.

Reviewed by Jeffrey S. on 1/18/2019 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Great product and company.

# Menzerna Super Finish Plus 3800 (250ml & 1L)

Product code: 22992.281.001

Product Images:
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/13847-700-700/super-finish-plus-3800.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/17092-700-700/super-finish-plus-3800.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/17093-700-700/super-finish-plus-3800.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/17094-700-700/super-finish-plus-3800.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/17095-700-700/super-finish-plus-3800.png

Sizes: 250ml, 1 Litre
Price: 12.95 GBP
Stock: In Stock

## Previously Known As PO85RD.

Menzerna Super Finish Plus 3800 was specifically designed with show cars in mind. Capable of removing fine scratches, swirls and holograms, Super Finish Plus 3800 leaves the highest possible gloss shine and reflective finish, sure to show off your car in any light!

Designed as the absolute final finish for all paint finishing, generating virtually no dust and eliminating buffer trails, holograms, and light machine marks after compounding. Super Finish Plus 3800 is a great step for the final high gloss shine before an application of wax or sealant such as Powerlock Ultra or Sealing Wax Protection.

Product Image: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/menzerna/22992_281w_1500.png

### Features & Benefits:
- Contains finest polishing abrasives
- Removes minor imperfections such as swirls, holograms & fine scratches
- Leaves a show car gloss finish
- Perfect for use on older or dry paintwork
- Suitable for all types of gloss paint finishes
- Easy to use
- Minimal dust generation

### Directions for use:
- Ensure surface is clean, dry & cool to the touch.
- Use a medium or soft foam pad (depending on the level of cut required).
- If using a DA polisher, apply 3-4 pea-sized drops to the pad.
- If using a rotary polisher, apply 1-2 pea-sized drops to the pad.
- Place pad against paintwork & start polisher on a slow speed to spread the product.
- Work product on a medium speed (4-5 with a Dual Action, 3-4 with a Rotary).
- Gradually increase speed until an oily film appears.
- Buff residue with soft microfibre.

### Technical Specification:
- Cut: 2/10
- Gloss: 10+/10
- Water-based
- Does not contain fillers
- Contains finest diminishing abrasives
- Suitable for use with rotary & dual action machine polishers
- Can also be applied by hand

Sizes: 250ml & 1 Litre

### Documents
- Menzerna Super Finish Plus 3800 Technical Data Sheet: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/Documents/Menzerna/Menzerna-Super-Finish-Plus-3800.pdf
- Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS): https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/MSDS/Menzerna-Super-Finish-Plus-3800.pdf

### Customer Reviews

Bob Turner - 03 Aug 2017 - "Amazing Gloss"
Used this polish to refine the paint on my black Jaguar XF and was very pleased with the results. Easy to apply and remove by DA polisher and very high gloss. Works in warmer temperatures whereas some other similar polishes seem to be harder to buff off.

Mark - 27 Nov 2016 - "Super final finish"
My go to polish, superb finish, high gloss ridiculously small amounts needed to work areas and easy to remove. Currently working for Aston Martin and they love this polish when used.

# Menzerna 3800 Super Finish Plus

Brand: Menzerna
SKU: MEN-3800-250ml

Product Image: https://www.cleanandshiny.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/menzerna-3800-250ml_1-756x698w.webp?v=1697550218&width=756

Price: £12.99
Stock: In stock

Pickup available from Unit 3, Redan Hill Industrial Estate, GU12 4SJ - Usually ready in 1 hour

## Menzerna 3800 Super Finish Plus

Menzerna Final Finish 3800 is an ultra-fine finishing polish that is designed to leave paint with the highest levels of gloss possible. It is specifically formulated to remove very fine 3000 grit marks, such as holograming and marring from more abrasive compounds.

Final Finish 3800 is unique to the Menzerna professional range and is so special that they have kept it for themselves. It can be used by random orbital or rotary polishing machines, and even by hand. For best results, use it in conjunction with a fine finishing pad.

This is a professional grade polish that will deliver stunning results. It is bodyshop safe and contains no fillers, silicones, waxes, or glazes. It is also easy to apply and remove with less dust.

### Benefits:
- Removes very fine 3000 grit marks, such as holograming and marring
- Leaves paint with the highest levels of gloss possible
- Bodyshop safe and contains no fillers, silicones, waxes, or glazes
- Easy to apply and remove with less dust

### How to Use:
- Wash and dry the vehicle thoroughly.
- Apply a small amount of Menzerna Final Finish 3800 to a fine finishing pad.
- Work the polish into the surface using a light amount of pressure and a medium rotational speed.
- Reduce the pressure and rotational speed as the polish begins to break down.
- Wipe away any residue with a clean microfiber cloth.

Bottle Size: 250ml

### Benefits:
- Finest abrasives for removing fogging and holograms

# Super Finish Plus 3800

## High-gloss polish for maximum deep shine

This automotive polish boasts genuine star quality and polishes micro scratches and holograms for sparkling performance. It is the perfect choice when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats.

Finish polish for maximum deep shine

### Processing
- Orbital: Upper rotational speed range
- By hand: Light pressure with circular motions

### Volumes
- 250ml: 22992.281.001
- 1l: 22992.261.001

### Cut/Gloss
2/10

### Steps
- Step 1: Heavy Cut
- Step 2: Medium Cut
- Step 3: Finish
- Step 4: Protection

### Optimised for
- Premium Microfiber Cloth
- Hand Polishing Applicator
- Soft Cut Foam Pad

### Product Images
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_SFP3800_1100x1100.png
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autopolitur_Super_Finish_Plus_3800_freigestellt_1100x1100.png
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22992.261.001/rotation01.jpg

### Benefits
- Anti-hologram polish for the removal of gray smears and holograms
- Show-car finish
- Silicone-free

### Recommended usage
- Clean the surface thoroughly.
- Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the Soft Cut Foam Pad.
- We recommend an orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect finish. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator.
- Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently high rotational speed.
- At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
- Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
- Fine scratches, shading, smears and holograms have now been removed. The car coat can now be sealed with a Menzerna Protection product.

### Downloads
- Technical datasheet SFP 3800 (94.85 KB): https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_SFP3800_229924_20231113_EN.pdf

### Video
Car polish SFP 3800
The Menzerna SFP 3800 high-gloss polish not only takes care of micro scratches and holograms, but also generates maximum deep shine. The best automotive polish when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats. Show-car finish included.
Video URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MpSgsbR9Pw0

### FAQ

Q: Can I apply Menzerna polish by hand?
A: Yes, Menzerna car polishes can also be used for polishing by hand. In particular, Medium Cut 2400, One-Step Polish 3in1 and all Finish polishes and sealants are ideal for application by hand.

Q: How do I use polishes?
A: Polish is optimally applied using a polishing machine and the corresponding polishing pad. A hand-polishing applicator can simplify the process of polishing by hand.

Q: How do I polish a car and achieve a showroom finish?
A: It takes a multi-stage polishing process to give a car the ultimate level of shine. Menzerna offers various combinations that lead to a showroom finish. For example, the following finishes can be used in the order specified: HCC 400, MCP 2500, SFP 3800. To maintain the polishing results, a sealant such as Power Lock can be applied afterwards.

Q: How do I polish a black car?
A: Black paint is polished like other colors of paint. Either a Heavy Cut, Medium Cut, or Finish polish is selected depending on the condition of the paint. Because even the smallest scratches are easy to see on black cars, we recommend finishing off the polishing process with a Finish polish. The SF 3500 and SFP 3800 gloss polishes create the ultimate shine even on dark paints.

Q: What are holograms?
A: Holograms are fine polishing marks that can appear when polishing with a Heavy Cut or Medium Cut polish. They can be removed with a fine abrasive polish/a finish.

## Car polish SFP 3800
The Menzerna SFP 3800 high-gloss polish not only takes care of micro scratches and holograms, but also generates maximum deep shine. The best automotive polish when it comes to achieving maximum high gloss for black/dark coats. Show-car finish included.
